docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALOUSH, UZI AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA. ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALOUSH, UZI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA. ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER "DEFENDANT IS NOT ENTITLED TO COLLECT THE $749.36 BALANCE FOR SERVICES RENDERED ON 6/28/2013 AND IS ORDERED TO CEASE EFFORTS TO COLLECT SUCH AMOUNTS FROM PLAINTIFF AND TAKE CORRECTIVE MEASURES TO INFORM CREDIT AGENCIES ACCORDINGLY."PER JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,477.00 FILED BY ALOUSH, UZI AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA. ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-18-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA. ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-11-2015 BY QUEENA HO. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,477.00 FILED BY ALOUSH, UZI AS TO DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA. ST. MARY'S MEDICAL CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-06-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD 3 PAGES OF ATTACHMENTS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALOUSH, UZI

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-11-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE: QUEENA HO. FILED BY ALOUSH, UZI
